name: qa-ui-test
description: QA UI Testing + Bug Management — Playwright-based test automation พร้อม bug lifecycle (triage → export → verify), integration กับ long-running plugin (ส่ง bugs เป็น features ให้ /continue หยิบไป fix), idempotent multi-pass scenario creation, auto-template selection (cascade + approval workflow detection), Playwright CLI guide, multi-agent brainstorm, role-based + cascade testing, master-data CRUD, master-detail grid, opus review
